emails.subject: Carr Futures Non Disclosure
emails.body: Carr Futures Non Disclosure Tana, Sorry for the long winded voice mail. I have a meeting with Mark Thomas, Head of Energy with Carr Futures, Inc. in London this Tuesday the 27th of February. Carr is a divisions of Credit Agricole Indosuez. Their information is as follows: 1-6 Lombard Street, London EC3V 9JU, UK tel. 020.7550.2355 fax 020.7550.2381 email: mthomas@carrfut.com I would like to execute a non disclosure agreement prior to our meeting. If possible, please email Mark Thomas our non disclosure agreement as soon as you can. Thanks, Dan 44-077-7190-5064

emails.subject: Re: Carr Futures Non Disclosure
emails.body: Re: Carr Futures Non Disclosure I just tried to call you, I couldn't get through. What are you discussing with Carr? Is this just for them to enter into an BETA, or something else? Also, do you want a bilateral agreement? Who will be providing the confidential information? It shouldn't take me too long to draft you and NDA once I get this info. I'll email it to the counterparty and copy you in on the email. Of course, we have to get it signed here in Houston, so time is of the essence... Daniel Diamond 02/22/2001 08:45 AM
